creator: vas@sibptus.ru
text:
All comments are displayed from top to bottom (newest last) which is right.

However, when you reply to someone's comment, the text input field opens at the very top of the thread. So, if you need to quote something from the comment you are replying to, you have to scroll all the way down and then up again. It is very inconvenient.

Could you please make the text input field open below the older comments?
